bodyComposition.limitations: Conservative engineering heuristic for comparable household BIA measurements; not a clinical model.
bodyComposition.measurementSelection: All scale measurements in the adaptive reference window are grouped by date independently from DailyRecord existence.
bodyComposition.diagnosticCandidate: With at least two valid composition dates, raw slopes and energy are calculated for diagnostics even when activation thresholds fail.

personalized.suggestion: scale all three entered g/kg values by target_kcal / calculated_macro_kcal

workoutCaloriesContract.rule: Completed workouts expose a non-negative active-calorie value consumed by the day; nutrition does not model exercise calories internally.
